title: Create Style Sophisticated Storages
body:
## **Create Style Sophisticated Storages**

**_Sophisticated Storages but Creatified!_**  

***
A Resource Pack that makes [Sophisticated Storages](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage) look like one of [Create](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/create) mod's blocks/items!
